Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Norman J Wickett, ... Gane KS Wong, Jim Leebens-Mack. Nov 2014. Phylotranscriptomic analysis of the origin and early diversification of land plants. Proc. Natl. Acad. Sci. USA 111: E4859-E4868. PMID: 25355905

@Article{,
  title = {Phylotranscriptomic analysis of the origin and early diversification of land plants},
  author = {{Wickett} and Norman J and {Mirarab} and {Siavash} and {Nguyen} and {Nam} and {Warnow} and {Tandy} and {Carpenter} and {Eric} and {Matasci} and {Naim} and {Ayyampalayam} and {Saravanaraj} and {Barker} and Michael S and {Burleigh} and J Gordon and {Gitzendanner} and Matthew A and others},
  journal = {Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences},
  volume = {111},
  number = {45},
  pages = {E4859--E4868},
  year = {2014},
  publisher = {National Acad Sciences},
}

Naim Matasci, ... Jim Leebens-Mack, Gane KS Wong. Oct 2014. Data access for the 1,000 Plants (1KP) project. GigaScience 3: 17. PMID: 25625010

@Article{,
  title = {Data access for the 1,000 Plants (1KP) project},
  author = {{Matasci} and {Naim} and {Hung} and {Ling-Hong} and {Yan} and {Zhixiang} and {Carpenter} and Eric J and {Wickett} and Norman J and {Mirarab} and {Siavash} and {Nguyen} and {Nam} and {Warnow} and {Tandy} and {Ayyampalayam} and {Saravanaraj} and {Barker} and {Michael} and others},
  journal = {Gigascience},
  volume = {3},
  number = {1},
  pages = {17},
  year = {2014},
  publisher = {BioMed Central},
}

Yinlong Xie, ... Gane KS Wong, Jun Wang. Jun 2014. SOAPdenovo-Trans: de novo transcriptome assembly with short RNA-Seq reads. Bioinformatics 30: 1660-1666. PMID: 24532719

@Article{,
  title = {SOAPdenovo-Trans: de novo transcriptome assembly with short RNA-Seq reads},
  author = {{Xie} and {Yinlong} and {Wu} and {Gengxiong} and {Tang} and {Jingbo} and {Luo} and {Ruibang} and {Patterson} and {Jordan} and {Liu} and {Shanlin} and {Huang} and {Weihua} and {He} and {Guangzhu} and {Gu} and {Shengchang} and {Li} and {Shengkang} and others},
  journal = {Bioinformatics},
  volume = {30},
  number = {12},
  pages = {1660--1666},
  year = {2014},
  publisher = {Oxford University Press},
}

Marc TJ Johnson, ... Gane KS Wong. Nov 2012. Evaluating methods for isolating total RNA and predicting the success of sequencing phylogenetically diverse plant transcriptomes. PLoS One 7: e50226. PMID: 23185583

@Article{,
  title = {Evaluating methods for isolating total RNA and predicting the success of sequencing phylogenetically diverse plant transcriptomes},
  author = {{Johnson} and Marc TJ and {Carpenter} and Eric J and {Tian} and {Zhijian} and {Bruskiewich} and {Richard} and {Burris} and Jason N and {Carrigan} and Charlotte T and {Chase} and Mark W and {Clarke} and Neil D and {Covshoff} and {Sarah} and {Edger} and Patrick P and others},
  journal = {PloS one},
  volume = {7},
  number = {11},
  pages = {e50226},
  year = {2012},
  publisher = {Public Library of Science},
}
